race.comment: TRIBAL COUNCIL (3) has been racing well in this class, the latest beaten a head when sitting handy throughout. Can go one better. FIRST LINE (10) is back in Tassie after a three start stint in Victoria. Was racing in tougher grade than this before she left and gets chance to find some form. Definitely has the ability.  ZULU FIELDS (9) is a super consistent type who looks weighted to feature with the claim. Will go forward and give a sight. WILD NIGHTS (7) was safely held on the synthetic two back at Devonport then ran on hard to score here last time in a Class1. Confidence back and is worth following up. ROYAL DETECTIVE (5) resumes and was a fresh-up winner last campaign so worth keeping safe.
